hero.headline:
An AI-native team delivers more, 
faster and at higher quality.
hero.subheadline: AI is woven into every project. Faster delivery, higher quality, better investment.

items.title: AI-native development
items.description: AI is built into how we work. This means faster development and higher quality in every project.

items.title: Top-tier expertise
items.description: Every consultant has passed a demanding recruitment process. Our team is made up of the best in the field.

items.title: Partner that creates value
items.description: We understand your business and build solutions that create competitive advantage.

pillar1.title: AI-native software development
pillar1.description: We build your information systems in their full scope. Whether it's e-commerce, an ERP or business-critical infrastructure, we bring the best talent to every project.

pillar2.title: Applied AI Engineering
pillar2.description: We help you integrate AI into your existing systems, products and services.

pillar3.title: Modernisation & integrations
pillar3.description: Technical debt is cheap to accumulate and many have it we help pay it down. We modernise legacy information systems for the new era.

ura.title: We do software development differently. Join us.

items.title: Frontier development environment
items.description: AI is part of every project. You grow your skills in an environment where the industry's best methods are everyday practice.

items.title: Demanding challenges
items.description: Our team solves business-critical systems for demanding clients. There are no simple tasks on offer.

items.title: Impact you can see
items.description: Every project shows up in the client's business. You build systems that actually matter.

yhteydenotto.title: Tell us about your project.
yhteydenotto.subtitle: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

step1.headline: Let's build something better, together.
step1.sub: Book a free 30-minute discovery call. An honest conversation about how we can help.

step2.headline: What's your main challenge?
step2.sub: Pick the closest match. We'll tailor the call to your situation.

options.label: I need a new software system
I want AI integrated into my business
Legacy system is slowing us down

step3.headline: Book your call
step3.sub: We'll reach out within 24 hours to schedule the call.

step4.headline: Thanks! We'll be in touch soon.
